description: Example MCP tool call to list all Storybook component documentation

content.text:
Available components and documentation:

## Components
- Button (Components/Button) - 5 stories
- Input (Components/Input) - 3 stories
- Modal (Components/Modal) - 4 stories
- Card (Components/Card) - 2 stories

## Pages
- Home (Pages/Home) - 1 story
- Login (Pages/Login) - 2 stories
